pin.enterDescription: Use the positions shown on your KeepKey to enter your PIN
pin.createDescription: Look at your KeepKey screen and tap the positions to set a new PIN
pin.confirmDescription: Enter the same PIN again to confirm

passphrase.title: Enter Passphrase
passphrase.description: Your device has passphrase protection enabled. Enter your BIP-39 passphrase to unlock. Leave empty for the default wallet.
passphrase.warning: Passphrases are case-sensitive. A different passphrase generates a completely different wallet.

pairing.wantsToConnect: wants to connect to your KeepKey
pairing.keyboardHint: Enter to approve · Esc to reject

signing.title: Signing Request
signing.keyboardHint: Enter to approve · Esc to reject

claimed.title: Device In Use
claimed.description: Your KeepKey was detected but is currently claimed by another application (e.g. KeepKey Desktop, a browser extension, or scdaemon).
claimed.step1: 1. Close other apps using your KeepKey
claimed.waiting: Waiting for device to become available...
